reasoning: The limiter we need to address is your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Your last ride was a low-intensity session, so now we need to ramp up to simulate parts of the Alpine Loop, specifically with over-unders to build that endurance and clearance capacity.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 minutes, alternating 2 minutes at 218W and 2 minutes at 248W, with 5 minutes easy spinning between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
